profile_summary:
Zhe Zhao，USTC+CityU HK 联合培养博士。
· 师从张青富系统学习多目标优化与进化算法。
· 开发 U2E 自动算法进化系统（早于 Alpha Evolve），在组学、PDE 等领域超越人类专家；探索矩阵乘法等底层优化。
· 斯坦福期间主导 Eureka 科研论文撰写系统，将假设与已有研究验证后自动生成可投稿论文。
· 一作：NIPS 2024/2025, ICML 2024/2025, AAAI 2024/2025, TKDE 等；长尾学习、图神经网络、因果图网络。
· 已有合作：NTU 安波(2025.3-7)、Stanford 仇夏婕 Qiu(2025.7-2026.6)。

research_route.year1_focus: Develop unified theoretical foundations for evolutionary algorithms and integrated systems, leveraging MIT's mathematical rigor and Zhao's practical experience
research_route.year2_focus: Establish theoretical guarantees for evolutionary optimization in complex systems, with applications to Zhao's previous work in PDEs and matrix multiplication
research_route.continuity_from_background: Directly extends Zhao's training in multi-objective optimization under Zhang Qingfu, deepening theoretical understanding while maintaining practical relevance

exit_options: Tenure-track professor at top university
Research scientist at theoretical AI lab
Consultant for algorithm design
pros: Strong theoretical foundation
High academic prestige
Long-term research impact
cons: Less immediate industry application
Competitive academic environment

anchor.advisor_or_team: AutoML and Automated Systems Research Team

research_route.year1_focus: Integrate U2E automatic algorithm evolution system with DAMO's AutoML platform to optimize large-scale industrial AI models, focusing on multi-objective optimization for model compression and deployment.
research_route.year2_focus: Lead projects on automated scientific discovery, applying evolutionary algorithms to accelerate research in bioinformatics (e.g., genomics) and computational physics, building on PDE optimization expertise.
key_outputs: Patents for automated AI model optimization
High-impact publications in venues like ICML/NeurIPS
Deployed systems in Alibaba Cloud for enterprise clients
research_route.continuity_from_background: Directly leverages Zhe's PhD work on U2E and multi-objective optimization under Zhang Qingfu, with applications in omics and PDEs, and extends automated research systems akin to Eureka.

exit_options: Promotion to senior researcher at DAMO
Transition to AI leadership roles in Alibaba Cloud or other tech giants
Academic positions in top Chinese universities
pros: Access to vast computational resources and real-world data
High industry impact and visibility
Strong alignment with China's AI strategy and funding
cons: Potential IP restrictions limiting open publication
Fast-paced environment may reduce deep research time
Geographic focus in China might limit global collaborations

anchor.advisor_or_team: EECS系，Michael I. Jordan实验室（机器学习与优化方向）

research_route.year1_focus: 结合进化算法与贝叶斯优化，研究大规模机器学习模型的自动化超参数调优与架构搜索
research_route.year2_focus: 探索因果图网络在优化问题中的应用，开发可解释的AI优化方法，并撰写高影响力论文
research_route.continuity_from_background: 直接延续在进化算法、多目标优化和因果图网络的研究，利用伯克利在机器学习理论的优势深化学术成果，与斯坦福Eureka项目经验互补

exit_options: 申请美国顶尖大学助理教授职位（如MIT、Stanford）
加入美国科技公司研究部门（如Google Brain、Meta AI）
返回亚洲学术界（如NTU、USTC）
pros: 顶级学术环境与导师指导
高自由度探索前沿研究方向
增强国际学术网络与声誉
cons: 博士后薪资相对较低
职位临时性，需规划后续职业
竞争激烈，发表压力大

anchor.advisor_or_team: 自动驾驶与智能系统实验室

research_route.year1_focus: 将多目标优化与进化算法应用于自动驾驶系统的感知与决策模块，提升系统鲁棒性与效率
research_route.year2_focus: 开发基于U2E系统的自动算法进化框架，优化自动驾驶中的长尾场景处理与实时计算
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续在自动算法进化（U2E）和多目标优化方面的专长，应用于工业级自动驾驶问题，与组学、PDE优化经验形成技术迁移

exit_options: 晋升为达摩院高级研究员
转至其他大厂AI实验室（如腾讯、字节）
创业或加入自动驾驶初创公司
pros: 高薪资与资源支持
接触大规模真实数据与应用场景
快速技术落地与产业影响
cons: 研究方向可能受商业目标限制
发表学术论文的自由度较低
工作强度较高

research_route.year1_focus: Develop theoretical guarantees for integrating graph neural networks with evolutionary algorithms in reinforcement learning, focusing on convergence, scalability, and robustness proofs
research_route.year2_focus: Apply these theories to practical RL tasks, such as multi-agent systems or recommendation optimizations, validating with empirical studies from CMU's applied focus
key_outputs: Theoretical papers in top journals (e.g., JMLR)
research_route.continuity_from_background: Uses Zhe's deep knowledge in evolutionary algorithms and GNNs, with a shift toward rigorous formalism, supported by prior publication record in theoretical venues

exit_options: Tenure-track faculty at elite universities
Research scientist in corporate AI labs with theoretical focus
Government or NGO roles in AI policy/standards
pros: Foundational impact in ML theory
Long-term career stability in academia
High respect in research community
cons: Slower immediate practical applications
Niche focus may limit industry options

research_route.year1_focus: Develop theoretical foundations for evolutionary algorithm integration with large-scale AI systems
research_route.year2_focus: Establish convergence guarantees and complexity bounds for hybrid evolutionary-neural architectures
research_route.continuity_from_background: Builds on strong theoretical training from USTC while addressing cutting-edge AI integration challenges

exit_options: Tenure-track academic positions
Research scientist at theory-focused labs
AI policy advisory roles
pros: Strong academic prestige
Theoretical depth
Long-term impact
cons: Less immediate practical application
Competitive academic market
Slower career progression

anchor.advisor_or_team: Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory (CSAIL), Optimization and Learning Group

research_route.year1_focus: Work on fundamental optimization problems in AI, such as matrix multiplication and PDE solving, using evolutionary methods.
research_route.year2_focus: Apply multi-objective optimization to causal graph networks and long-tail learning, with interdisciplinary collaborations.
key_outputs: Collaborations with MIT labs and industry
research_route.continuity_from_background: Builds on PhD work in multi-objective optimization, matrix multiplication optimization, and experience with top-tier publications and Stanford collaborations.

exit_options: Professor at elite universities
Research scientist at top AI companies
Government or nonprofit research roles
pros: Prestigious institution with world-class resources
Opportunities for groundbreaking research
Strong alumni network for career advancement
cons: High expectations and pressure to produce significant results
Cost of living in Boston area

research_route.original: Y1=Develop unified theoretical foundations for evolution
research_route.mutated: Y1=Develop unified theoretical foundations for evolutionary algorithms, with potential extension to Y2 applications in causal inference

anchor.focus: Evolutionary algorithms fused with large-scale AI systems

research_route.year1_focus: Integrate U2E automatic algorithm evolution system with large-scale AI models to develop self-evolving AI architectures
research_route.year2_focus: Apply evolutionary optimization to improve training efficiency and generalization of foundation models
research_route.continuity_from_background: Direct application of U2E system expertise to cutting-edge AI research, leveraging evolutionary algorithm background

Academic positions with industry collaborations
AI startup founder

High-impact publications
Strong industry recognition
cons: Intense competition
Potential IP restrictions
Fast-paced environment

recommendations.brief: 在MIT CSAIL优化与学习组深化多目标优化与进化算法研究，利用顶尖学术资源推动算法理论创新。
pros: 世界顶级AI实验室，学术声誉极高
与Zhe Zhao的多目标优化背景高度匹配
提供前沿研究平台和顶尖导师资源
有利于建立国际学术网络
cons: 竞争极其激烈，录取难度大
可能需要适应美国学术文化
研究压力可能较大
recommendations.best_for: 追求学术卓越、希望在优化算法理论领域做出突破性贡献的研究者

recommendations.brief: 结合Zhe Zhao的U2E系统开发经验，在MIT CSAIL探索自动化算法设计与底层优化问题。
pros: 与自动算法进化系统经验直接相关
可深化矩阵乘法等底层优化研究
有机会将学术成果转化为实际应用
斯坦福合作经历有助于适应顶尖研究环境
cons: 研究方向可能较为专精
需要平衡理论创新与实际应用
可能面临高强度研究节奏
recommendations.best_for: 希望在自动化算法设计和底层优化领域深耕的学术研究者

recommendations.brief: 利用Eureka论文撰写系统经验，在MIT CSAIL推动AI辅助科研方法论的发展与创新。
pros: 可扩展Eureka系统的研究应用
结合AI与科研工作流的独特优势
有利于发表高影响力方法论论文
与现有研究经历形成良好衔接
cons: 相对新兴的研究方向，成熟度较低
可能需要跨学科合作能力
成果评估标准可能不够明确
recommendations.best_for: 对AI辅助科研方法论感兴趣、希望推动科研范式变革的创新者

recommendations.brief: 在MIT其他相关院系或实验室探索跨学科研究机会，拓展AI优化在更广泛领域的应用。
pros: MIT整体学术环境优越，资源丰富
提供跨学科合作的可能性
可根据兴趣灵活选择研究方向
有利于建立多元化的学术背景
cons: 研究方向可能不够聚焦
需要主动寻找合适的导师和项目
竞争同样激烈，定位可能不明确
recommendations.best_for: 希望保持研究灵活性、探索AI优化在不同领域交叉应用的研究者

recommendations.brief: 在阿里巴巴达摩院AutoML团队将学术研究成果转化为工业级自动化系统，推动实际应用落地。
pros: 直接应用自动算法进化系统经验
工业界资源丰富，实践机会多
研究成果可快速转化为产品
国内发展前景广阔，职业路径清晰
cons: 学术自由度可能相对受限
研究方向更偏向应用而非理论
可能需要适应企业研发节奏
recommendations.best_for: 希望将AI优化技术产业化、追求技术落地应用的实践型人才
